description.en: List iMessage conversations with contact identifiers.
description.es: List iMessage conversations with contact identifiers.
description.fr: List iMessage conversations with contact identifiers.
description.ro: List iMessage conversations with contact identifiers.
description.it: List iMessage conversations with contact identifiers.

prompt.macos:
/osascript -e 'tell application "Messages"
set chatList to every chat
set output to ""
set chatCount to 0
repeat with c in chatList
if chatCount ≥ {{LIMIT}} then exit repeat
try
set chatId to id of c
set ps to participants of c
set contactName to ""
set contactHandle to ""
if (count of ps) > 0 then
set contactName to name of item 1 of ps
set contactHandle to handle of item 1 of ps
end if
set output to output & contactHandle & " | " & contactName & linefeed
set chatCount to chatCount + 1
end try
end repeat
return output
end tell'

inputs.name: Limit
inputs.bot: How many recent conversations to list. Default to 15 if the user doesn't specify.
